stemHtml: An aircraft has been flying with a defective transponder and the failure has been deferred in accordance with the MEL. During a short turnaround, an engineer replaces the defective transponder with a new one. Prior to commencing the next flight, what must the commander ensure?

options.a: The operator and commander shall sign the maintenance release to confirm the work was carried out to the transponder manufacturer's required standards.
options.b: The operator shall sign the maintenance release.
options.c: The maintenance organisation signs the maintenance release to confirm the work was carried out to the maintenance organisation's required standards.
options.d: The commander only shall sign the maintenance release.
